message.content:
Look at the exam-system project to understand how frontend and backend services work together through the gateway.

1. Read D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams-system/test-deploy/gateway/nginx/conf.d/00-upstreams.conf - find the exam-system upstream definition
2. Read D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams-system/test-deploy/gateway/nginx/conf.d/xexam-test.conf  
3. Read D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams-system/test-deploy/kubernetes/exam-system/03-exam-system-deployment.yaml - look at how services are defined
4. Check if exam-web has nginx config that routes /api to backend: search in D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams-system/exam-web/ for nginx.conf or default.conf

Tell me:
- What does the exam-system upstream point to (which K8s service)?
- Does the exam-system-svc serve both frontend and backend, or just frontend?
- How does the frontend route API requests to the backend (exam-server)?
- Is the gateway correctly configured to handle both frontend pages and backend API calls?
